schools.title: My Schools

schools.emptyDescription: Create your first school to get started.

school.editDescription: Update the name of this school.
school.name: Name

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: {name} — {count, plural, one {# member} other {# members}}
members.addDescription: Invite a user to this school by their email address.
members.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this school? This action cannot be undone.

curriculum.title: Curriculum
curriculum.description: Define weekly hours per class and subject

curriculum.noEntries: No curriculum entries yet. Add entries to define what needs to be scheduled.

scheduler.description: Generate a timetable for the selected term
scheduler.noViolations: No violations — all lessons placed successfully
scheduler.applyConfirm: Apply this schedule? This will replace any existing timetable for this term.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage school reference data
settings.accessDenied: You need admin access to view this page.

terms.name: Name
terms.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the term "{name}". This cannot be undone.
terms.deleteConflict: Cannot delete — term is still referenced by other records.

classes.name: Name
classes.deleteConfirm: This will deactivate the class "{name}". It can be restored later.

subjects.name: Name
subjects.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the subject "{name}". This cannot be undone.
subjects.deleteConflict: Cannot delete — subject is still referenced by other records.

teachers.deleteConfirm: This will deactivate the teacher "{name}". It can be restored later.

rooms.name: Name
rooms.maxConcurrentHint: How many classes can use this room at the same time
rooms.capacityGridHint: Click a cell to change the capacity for that timeslot.
rooms.deleteConfirm: This will deactivate the room "{name}". It can be restored later.

suitability.empty_subjects_hint: No subjects configured for this school yet.

timeslots.label: Label
timeslots.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete this timeslot. This cannot be undone.
timeslots.deleteConflict: Cannot delete — timeslot is still referenced by other records.

scheduler.section_soft_description: Higher weights prioritise the constraint. Set to 0 to disable.
scheduler.section_hard_description: Allow the solver to violate a rule with the given penalty when no strict solution exists.

preferred_slot.label: Preferred slot
preferred_slot.description: Penalise teaching in slots not marked as preferred.

teacher_gap.label: Teacher gaps
teacher_gap.description: Penalise free periods between lessons on the same day.

subject_distribution.label: Subject distribution
subject_distribution.description: Penalise teaching the same subject twice on one day.

class_teacher_first_period.label: Class teacher first period
class_teacher_first_period.description: Prefer the class teacher to teach the first period of each day.

teacher_max_hours.label: Teacher max hours
teacher_max_hours.description: Teacher exceeds their weekly hour budget.

teacher_qualification.label: Teacher qualification
teacher_qualification.description: Teacher is not qualified for the subject.

room_suitability.label: Room suitability
room_suitability.description: Room is not suitable for the subject.

room_capacity.label: Room capacity
room_capacity.description: Room is too small for the class.

term.title: Create a term
term.description: Most other settings need at least one term.

classes.title: Add classes
classes.description: List the school classes that need a timetable.

subjects.title: Add subjects
subjects.description: Define the subjects taught at your school.

teachers.title: Add teachers
teachers.description: Add the teachers who will be assigned lessons.

timeslots.title: Configure timeslots
timeslots.description: Set up the school's weekly periods.

curriculum.title: Set up curriculum
curriculum.description: Decide which subjects each class gets, how often, and with whom.
